calibration_note: Recomputed offline from the same Sonnet/Opus gradings (no re-query). Binary collapse (D-16) dropped: the judge never emits 'irrelevant', so the collapsed kappa was degenerate (0.000). Reported kappa is the full 3-grade Cohen's kappa. Both models fall below the 0.6 floor -> advisory-only: the LLM judge may add evidence but never overrides the recall@k guardrail (Phase 11 JUDGE-02 contract).
